title: TODO: short title
description: A stale asset is being served to users because the Cloudflare cache was not purged after a deployment. The cache state file shows stale_asset=true and purge_status=pending. Both fields must be updated to confirm the purge completed and the edge is serving fresh content.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/cloudflare-cache-purge/cache.state to see the purge status
